title: Pause Time
description: Pause Time With The Click Of A Button!
body:
![Pause Time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98c7b63b2859b13be068bced4ebd299cd66deef3.png)

# **Pause Time with the buttons J and K.**
_Customizeable in the settings._
## How to install: 
- Download the mod.
- Add to mods folder in .minecraft
- Open a world
- Change Keybinds at the bottom of the Keybinds Settings. (Optional)
- Have Fun!
